notes: Captured via in-page fetch hook (authenticated browser session).
Field names are protobuf camelCase; snake_case alternates rejected (duplicate-field error).

connectorType enum observed: "POSTGRES". Config uses a protobuf oneof — the body nests the dialect-specific fields under the enum name lowercased (e.g. `postgres: {host, port, user, password, database, dialect, sslMode}`). Other connector types (bigquery/snowflake/redshift/mysql/sqlserver/databricks/supabase/motherduck) almost certainly follow the same pattern; unverified in this capture.
connectorId is an integer (not a UUID). createdAt is RFC3339. authStrategy observed: "service_role".
Request: `{connectorId: <int>}`. Alternate key `{id}` returns 404. Response: `{connector: {...}}` with dialect-specific `<dialect>Metadata` (e.g. `postgresMetadata`) — password is redacted/omitted.
